signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2-2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4%, amid Middle East energy volatility[2][3].  
Statistics Korea data confirms the rise (2.16% YoY per rateinflation.com), with monthly CPI up 0.34%, while Bank of Korea held rates at 2
